testcase.name: Validate room details response structure against schema
testcase.system-out: When User requests to get room details for roomid "1".......................passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain room information................................passed And Room details should conform to the room schema..........................passed

testcase.name: Validate room details response structure against schema 2
testcase.system-out: When User requests to get room details for roomid "2".......................passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain room information................................passed And Room details should conform to the room schema..........................passed
